path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 07 - Yoshi (N64, Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (1999)\01. Athletic Theme - Super Mario World.mp3
description: This should be Mario music! And it kinda bothers me that the Super Mario World stage and this remix have been lumped in as 'Yoshi' franchise just because the first world is called 'Yoshi Valley'. The music is fine.
title: Athletic Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 07: Yoshi

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 07 - Yoshi (N64, Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (1999)\02. Yoshi's Island (Brawl).mp3
description: This is a stunning, joyful remix of Yoshi's Island Flower Garden theme. Honestly, it's everything. It's such a great party vibe. Music to smile to.
title: Yoshi's Island
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 07: Yoshi

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 07 - Yoshi (N64, Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (1999)\03. Yoshi's Island (for 3DS & Wii U).mp3
description: Another great rendition of the Flower Garden theme, with a bonus opening theme in there too. I really like it. I especially love the map theme coming in at the end before the loop. Back when Yoshi was announced for Smash 4, I was so excited and listening to this a lot.
title: Yoshi's Island
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 07: Yoshi

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 07 - Yoshi (N64, Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (1999)\04. Obstacle Course - Yoshi's Island.mp3
description: It bothers me that they called it Obstacle Course when it's the athletic theme, but whatever. This is nice because it contains two versions! There's the spring/summer version which is bombastic and in my opinion and bit much, and then the much nicer autumn/winter version which is much more of a vibe.
title: Obstacle Course - Yoshi's Island
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 07: Yoshi

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 07 - Yoshi (N64, Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (1999)\07. Yoshi's Story (64).mp3
description: I kinda like how goofy this sounds with the slightly off-key (?) pianos/organs and flutes. It's giving children playing recorder vibes while not sounding terrible. I like it.
title: Yoshi's Story
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 07: Yoshi

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 07 - Yoshi (N64, Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (1999)\08. Yoshi's Story (Melee).mp3
description: This music is alright, but it's one of the weaker Melee remixes. This has nothing on Temple or Jungle Japes or any of the big hitters. My heart goes out to all the Melee players who constantly played on this stage with this music.
title: Yoshi's Story
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 07: Yoshi

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 07 - Yoshi (N64, Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (1999)\09. Yoshi's Tale.mp3
description: This particular remix may have fallen out of fashion, being the default song on the tournament legal Yoshi's Story stage in Ultimate, but it will always have a special place in my heart. Back when I was maining Yoshi and following the updates on the Brawl website, the teaser they posted of this track was everything. A joyful samba-style version of the best song from Yoshi's Story, a pivotal game of my childhood. I love it. I even like the singing.
title: Yoshi's Tale
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 07: Yoshi

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 07 - Yoshi (N64, Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (1999)\10. Flower Field.mp3
description: Cool that they added a remix from this obscure spin-off game. Through hearing it so many times due to the stage being tournament legal I've really come to love it. I'm really not bored of it at all. It's so catchy and nice.
title: Flower Field
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 07: Yoshi

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 07 - Yoshi (N64, Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (1999)\11. Wildlands.mp3
description: I love Yoshi's Island DS! I played this before the original as a child so this is where my allegience lies. The soundtrack isn't a varied as the original, but this one main theme that they used over and over is fucking great. This remix is also pretty good.
title: Wildlands
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 07: Yoshi

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 07 - Yoshi (N64, Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (1999)\12. Main Theme - Yoshi's New Island.mp3
description: Yoshi's New Island was really bad but they did manage to come up with a great main theme, and this remixer has done a great job of making it sound even better. I really like it.
title: Main Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 07: Yoshi

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 07 - Yoshi (N64, Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (1999)\13. Main Theme - Yoshi's New Island.mp3
description: Yoshi's New Island... a terrible game. This is the main theme. I lke it but the whistling is ever so slightly off key which just hurts my ears. It's a no from me.
title: Main Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 07: Yoshi

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 07 - Yoshi (N64, Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (1999)\14. Bandit Valley.mp3
description: They added a variation of the main theme from Yoshi's New Island! I actually really like it. It hasn't got to the off-key whistling, instead it's just a super nice chill-out vibe. I have unironically picked this song in tournament, it's great for if you need to calm down and you're not playing Wii Fit (no access to Deep Breathing).
title: Bandit Valley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 07: Yoshi

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 07 - Yoshi (N64, Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (1999)\15. Main Theme - Yoshi's Woolly World.mp3
description: I'll never forget Smash 4 coming out with this stage and remix before Woolly World even came out! This is the first we heard of the underground theme, which is wild when you think about it, because these remixes are meant to celebrate the games that people already love. Or maybe they're to advertise other Nintendo games, that's probably more likely. I like the remix but I feel like it sounds a bit too clean and sanitized. I also think the underground theme straight up isn't good.
title: Main Theme - Yoshi's Woolly World
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 07: Yoshi

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 07 - Yoshi (N64, Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (1999)\16. Main Theme - Yoshi's Woolly World.mp3
description: I like Yoshi's Woolly World a lot. This main theme from it is alright, but once again, the off-key whistling/recorder strikes. There is better music from this game without that for sure. Mostly I'm just sad they did put in the stage for Ultimate. It was great.
title: Main Theme - Yoshi's Woolly World
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 07: Yoshi
